case_title: ADIL ELAMRANI JOUTEY VS. TRIPOLI BAY AREA INVESTMENTS, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF JOUTEY, ADIL ELAMRANI AS TO DEFENDANT TRIPOLI BAY AREA INVESTMENTS, LLC A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY, DBA MAZZAT BISTRO JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
